rotation.name: NB 1080v15
rotation.notes: Wide fit, plush, ideal for flat/wide feet

rotation.name: Asics Superblast 2
rotation.notes: Snappy, crisp for fast reps. Avoid bad surfaces at 105kg.

rotation.name: Asics Megablast
rotation.notes: Max cushion, peba-infused. Earns its keep at 105kg over distance.

rotation.name: Asics Novablast 5
rotation.notes: Daily trainer, not in primary rotation

rotation_rules.easy_runs: NB 1080v15 primary, Vomero Plus alt — rotate biweekly
rotation_rules.intervals: Superblast 2 (week A) and Megablast (week B) — alternate weekly
rotation_rules.long_run_conflict: If Megablast was used Thursday, switch to NB 1080v15 (foam needs 24h decompression)

principles: All shoes are high-stack max-cushion — appropriate for 105kg + heel striker
When one wears out, consider replacing with firmer option (NB Rebel v5 / Saucony Endorphin Speed) for tempo work
Stick to smooth pavement when possible (heel-strike + max stack on uneven surface = ankle wobble risk)
